 1 in 3rd digit = Preferred Generic 
 1 in 4th digit = Non-Preferred Generic 
 1 in 5th digit = Brand 
 1 in 6th digit = Preferred Brand 
 All 9s = Not Applicable 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2007. This field is only populated if the plan has an enhanced benefit design 
with extra coverage in the gap. 

There is variation in the number of formulary tiers over time. Before 2015, this variable also appeared 
in the Plan Characteristics - Base File (see GAP_COVERAGE_TYPE). The
